steps.title: Contrast umami intensity
steps.content: The student wants to highlight a difference between winged kelp and arame. The notes give the needed difference: participants rated winged kelp's umami intensity as moderate and arame's as high.

steps.title: Reject shared or unrelated facts
steps.content: Choice A says both seaweeds trigger umami but does not contrast intensity. Choice C only says both are brown seaweeds. Choice D shifts to ham and mushrooms. The remaining choice directly states that arame's umami flavor is more intense than winged kelp's. The answer is B.
